hero.title: One bot. Every module. Zero clutter.
hero.description: EVa runs your moderation, music, economy, levels, tickets and AI from a single beautifully-tuned bot. No premium walls. No bloat.

features.heading: Everything you'd install ten bots for.
features.subheading: Each module ships toggle-able, configurable and free. Pick what you need, ignore what you don't.

items.title: Lossless Music
items.description: Crystal-clear playback from YouTube, Spotify and SoundCloud with queue control and live filters.

items.title: Auto Moderation
items.description: Anti-spam, anti-raid, smart word filters and per-channel punishment rules out of the box.

items.title: Economy
items.description: Currency, shops, gambling, jobs and global leaderboards your members will actually use.

items.title: Leveling & XP
items.description: Voice + text XP with custom rank cards and automatic role rewards tuned to your server.

items.title: Tickets
items.description: Beautiful ticket panels with claiming, transcripts and category routing for your support team.

items.title: Giveaways
items.description: Entry requirements, bonus multipliers and one-click rerolls. Fully audit-logged.

items.title: AI Chat
items.description: Bring an in-server assistant your members can talk to, with personalities you control.

items.title: Web Dashboard
items.description: Configure every module from a sleek dashboard — no remembering commands required.

commands.heading: A peek at the 120+ slash commands.

items.desc: Play a song or playlist from any supported source
View and manage the current playback queue
Ban a member with optional message purge
Timeout a member for a set duration with a reason
Browse the in-server shop and buy items
Try your luck at the casino mini-games

cta.heading: Drop EVa into your server in 30 seconds.
cta.description: Free forever. Every module, every command, no upsell.

faq.heading: Quick answers.
faq.subheading: Anything else? Hop into the support server.

items.a: Yes. Every module and command ships free with no premium tiers or paywalls.

items.q: How do I add EVa to my server?
items.a: Hit the Add to Discord button, pick a server, authorize the permissions. You're live in under a minute.
Administrator is the easiest path, but you can hand-pick scoped permissions per module if you'd rather.

items.q: Can I configure modules per server?
items.a: Every module — moderation, leveling, economy, tickets — can be toggled and tuned independently.
All 120+ commands are slash commands with autocomplete, descriptions and built-in help.
The support server (linked in the footer) is staffed by the team and an active community.

footer.description: An opinionated all-in-one Discord bot for modern communities.
